rows: Avalon Hotel and Bungalows Palm Springs
The room was pretty to look at with nice stuff.   But Couldn’t get air conditioning working so was hot all night. Poor WiFi service. And right off PCH so loud traffic noises all night.

Good Evening Alexandra,    Thank you for sharing your feedback. We're pleased to hear you enjoyed the room’s aesthetic and accompaniments. However, we're sorry that issues with the air conditioning, Wi-Fi, and traffic noise affected your comfort.    We understand how important a restful stay is, and your comments help us as we continue to improve our guest experience. We truly appreciate you bringing these concerns to our attention and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a more comfortable visit.    Best,    Leah
Do not stay here. Dirty, rundown, poor to no customer service. The hotel is a total scam.

On arrival our private patio was dirty with soiled cushions with a dirty small carpet remnant as a door mat, the doors and walls in the rooms were disgustingly dirty, the pool was not heated & dirty, and the entire pool area looks abandoned and dirty. There is no place to put your stuff away in the room and no safe for your valuables. The "coffee and tea service" is a dirty counter with a small pot for coffee but get this... no coffee & no staff to request more. There is no staff from 5 pm to 7:30 am, so you're on your own if you run into any issues. We were locked out of our room for 2 hours since our keys quit working with no one at the front office. When we found our window broken before going to sleep. We had to leave it open over night as there was no one to call, again.  We discovered they knowingly placed us in there with a broken window after seeing they had tried to close it with blue painters tape on the outside. We kept finding spiders in our room I'm guessing from the window being open. There was a note on the front door stating they will be back at 7:30 am, but at 8:30 am still no staff to be found anywhere on property & no answer from the phone number posted.  You aren't walking distance to restaurant or beaches as the website alludes to. The complimentary bikes was 1 bike with flat tires & I don't know where you would possibly bike to from the hotel's location.  The website paints this picture of a trendy boutique hotel with great amenities. I'm guessing at one point it was but plain and simple this is a rundown hotel, with zero amenities, poor customer service and no customer service most of the time, and very loud road noise from the PCH. This was the strangest and worst hotel experience I have ever had. I highly discourage staying here.

Good Evening Laura,    Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear about the challenges you faced during your stay. From the condition of your room and patio to the lack of after-hours support and issues with amenities, it’s clear we fell short of providing the experience you expected and deserve.    We recognize how frustrating and disappointing this must have been and sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. While we regret the circumstances, your input is invaluable as we work to improve upon our guest experience. Should you wish to discuss your stay further, we’d welcome the opportunity.    Best,    Leah

Do not stay here! Overpriced for zero amenities and poor customer service.  I get they can't help the loud road noise from the PCH, but the rest is complete negligence. There is no one at the front desk/office after 5 pm, so we had to do a weird self check in. I was grateful I asked to have physical keys left outside our door as we never could get the mobile key to work & parking is scary and no lights at night with potted cactus in the walking dark path at night that we almost ran into.  The doors and walls are disgustingly dirty in the room and bathroom. We didn't want to touch the bathroom door with our hands, it's that gross.  The shower seal on the glass was missing so it would flood the bathroom floor every time we showered. They knowingly put us in a room with a broken ground floor window & we had to sleep with it open all night since there wouldn't be anyone in the office until the next morning. When we tried to fix it, we discovered they had placed blue painters tape on the outside in hopes it'd stay closed. We had multiple spiders in our room I'm guessing due to the window being open. They weren't able to move us rooms since they were all booked, so they put more tape over our window to hold it shut & told us not worry as their hotel was "safe". Our private outside patio had terribly soiled cushions, the ground was dirty with leaves, & our doormat consisted of a 12"x12" dirty carpet remnant. The pool was not heated as advertised and was very dirty with stuff floating in it. The cushions in the pool area were also very soiled & the entire pool area looked as if it had been abandoned. The complimentary bikes consist of 1 bike with flat tires. The coffee and tea service as advertised, consisted of one dirty counter with a very small pot of coffee with 1/2 cup of luke warm coffee in it. Our keys quit working, so we were locked out of our room for 2 hours waiting for staff to arrive after several phone calls. We ended up having to call the West LA location to speak to a manager to get us help in Malibu as the staff was not there at 7:30 as posted on the door.  We were only offered 15% compensation, but we haven't received confirmation that we will receive that. This was the strangest hotel experience we had ever encountered and we have traveled all the world. This is first review I have ever left, but I feel like I have to, to save others from the same experience.

Good Evening Ms. Larue,    Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear about the challenges you faced during your stay. From the condition of your room and patio to the lack of after-hours support and issues with amenities, it’s clear we fell short of providing the experience you expected and deserve.    We recognize how frustrating and disappointing this must have been and sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused.  While we regret the circumstances, your input is invaluable as we work to improve upon our guest experience.  Should you wish to discuss your stay further, we’d welcome the opportunity.    Best,    Leah

Good Evening Tania,    Thank you for taking the time to fill out this review and I am so sorry to see that your stay did not hit your expectations.  I would love to speak with you more about your experience as any and all feedback is extremely valuable to further enhance future guests' stays.    Best,    Leah
